title: Obituary: Ferrari’s first monocoque maker John Thompson
summary: John Thompson never sought fame nor publicity, but his TC Prototypes (TCP) fabrication and subcontract company was a largely unsung linchpin of the motorsport industry in Britain and beyond for in excess of 30 years. title: Lewis Hamilton 'smells blood' as Red Bull face vital test
summary:
Join RacingNews365's Nick Golding and Samuel Coop as they look ahead to this weekend's Austrian Grand Prix! The discuss if Lewis Hamilton can continue his fine form after entering the title fight and the importance of Red Bull having a strong event at home.

Also in this week's podcast, Charles Leclerc needing a strong and smooth weekend is discussed after showing recent glimpses of speed before making mistakes, the rumours surrounding what is causing Mercedes' battery issues and if Sergio Perez should be driving for a stronger team.
